case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR''S OFFICE VS. HICHEM YOUNSI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$46.05) SERVED NOV-04-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNSI, HICHEM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNSI, HICHEM $1,079.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.06 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,125.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,079.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNSI, HICHEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT JOCELYN BROWN-DAVIS. DEFENDANT HICHEM YOUNSI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/09/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - IN DISPUTE - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
